title: mitracarpus linearis
intro: Mitracarpus linearis, also known as "Santa Maria", is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a shrub-like plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Mitracarpus linearis include its ability to treat digestive issues, wounds, and infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce fever. Mitracarpus linearis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
